title: Assurant Announces Closing of Public Offering of Senior Notes
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ) (“Assurant”), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, today announced the closing of a public offering of $175.0 million aggregate principal amount of its 6.100% Senior Notes due 2026 (the “Notes”). The net proceeds from the sale of the Notes will be approximately $173.

title: U.S. Mobile Trade-in Programs Returned Record-Breaking $3.8B to Consumers in 2022
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Assurant (NYSE:AIZ), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, today revealed that $3.8 billion was returned to U.S. consumers through mobile device trade-in programs in 2022. This is nearly 25% higher than the amount returned in 2021, making it the highest year on record. 2022 also saw a record breaking Q4, with $1.28 billion handed back to the consumers.

title: Assurant (AIZ) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Assurant (AIZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 24.71% and 1.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Assurant Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2022 Financial Results
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, today reported results for the fourth quarter and full-year ended December 31, 2022. “In 2022, we continued to execute on our vision to be the leading global business services provider supporting the advancement of the connected world.

title: Assurant Earns 2023 Great Place to Work Certification™ in the U.S.
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, is proud to be Certified™ by Great Place to Work® in the U.S. for the second consecutive year. The recognition, a gold standard in employer rankings, is based entirely on independent employee feedback on their experience working at Assurant. This year, 84% of employees participating in the survey affirmed that Assurant is a great place to work, which is 27 points higher than the average U.S. company.

title: Assurant (AIZ) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Assurant's (AIZ) Q4 earnings sre likely to benefit from device protection growth in North America, growth in Specialty and Other products and Lender-placed Insurance, and higher fixed maturity asset levels.
